hero.title: Bell'Acciano
hero.subtitle: Stay in the heart of the Abruzzi, between nature, quietness and sunshine.

village.title: The village
village.desc1: Surrounded by woods of holm oaks, Acciano is perched on a rocky spur between the Bufame and Pietre Fitte mountains, offering a beautiful view of the rocky ridges of Sirente. The steep slopes bordering the town frame the valley in which the Aterno-Pescara river flows. The municipality's territory lies between 450 and 1,303 meters above sea level.
village.desc2: Between heritage, nature and Italian traditions, every stroll becomes an invitation to discover a simple and warm way of life.

gites.title: Our Case
gites.subtitle: Each lodging has its own unique charm and a breathtaking view of the Abruzzi mountains

gite-1.shortDescription: A bright and charming studio in the heart of Acciano.
gite-1.longDescription: A bright studio located in the historic center of Acciano, ideal for recharging in the heart of nature with views of the Abruzzi mountains.

gite-2.longDescription: A bright two-room apartment in a quiet setting, ideal for relaxing in nature with views of the Sirente ridges.

gite-3.longDescription: A spacious and bright lodging accommodating up to 6 guests, perfect for family holidays in the historic center of Acciano.

amenities.private_shower: Private shower and sink in one bedroom

hero.title: Acciano, Abruzzi
hero.subtitle: A 12th-century medieval village, frozen in time in the heart of the mountains.

history.title: History & Heritage
history.desc: Surrounded by holm oak woods, Acciano is perched on a rocky spur between the Bufame and Pietre Fitte mountains, offering a striking view of the rocky ridges of Sirente. The steep slopes frame the valley where the Aterno-Pescara river flows. Founded in the 12th century, the village preserves the authenticity of its historic center and its centuries-old traditions.

access.title: How to get there
access.airport: 2 hours from Roma Fiumicino International Airport

car.title: By car
car.desc: Car rental available at the airport. Easy access by car to the historic center, free parking 20-60m from the house.

bus.title: By bus
bus.desc: Various buses from Rome, stop 10 km from Acciano. We will pick you up free of charge.

shuttle.title: Private shuttle
shuttle.desc: On reservation from the airport: Car (3-4 pers.) €120 / Mini Van (7 pers.) €280

taxi.title: By taxi
taxi.desc: Taxis available at the airport — approximately €360

welcome.title: Your arrival
welcome.desc: A warm welcome by Jérôme or the Case staff. Welcome food provided while you settle in.
welcome.flowers: All case are decorated with fresh flowers for your arrival.

practical.title: Practical information
practical.location: Le Case di Jérôme are located in the historic center of Acciano (12th century).

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.desc: Optional breakfast at La Cantina: €4.60 per person. Located across from the main square, Piazza del Municipio.

parking.title: Parking
parking.desc: Easy car access, free parking 20-60m from the house.

activities.title: Activities & Discoveries
activities.desc: Hiking in the Sirente-Velino Natural Park, discovery of medieval villages, Abruzzi gastronomy, local markets and much more.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Don't hesitate to reach out for any question or booking.
contact.emailSubject: Information request — les Case di Jérôme
contact.tagline: Authentic stays in the heart of Italy.
